## Related issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New DSA problem(s)
- [ ] Content (System Design / CS Fundamentals / cheatsheets)
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] If I added a problem: I added a `sample: true` test plus hidden edge-case tests, and verified the reference solution produces correct output by running it in the app
- [ ] I kept the PR focused on a single concern
- [ ] I updated docs/README where relevant
